changeSet.author: openelis-bacteriology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 5

changeSet.comment: Create Assay/Test Execution page for Bacteriology Laboratory notebook

column.name: instructions
column.value: Execute comprehensive bacteriology tests including microscopy examination, culture isolation, biochemical identification, drug susceptibility testing (disc diffusion, MIC, E-test), automated identification (VITEK, Phoenix, MALDI-TOF), and molecular techniques (PCR, WGS). Record all results with QC validation.

column.name: content
notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Bacteriology Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

changeSet.author: openelis-bacteriology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.workflow_page_template WHERE id = 205

changeSet.comment: Create workflow page template for Bacteriology Assay/Test Execution page

column.name: description
column.value: Comprehensive test execution including microscopy, culture isolation, biochemical identification, DST (disc diffusion, MIC, E-test), automated identification (VITEK, Phoenix, MALDI-TOF), and molecular techniques (PCR, WGS).
